Deng Mao (ťĄßŤĆā). Served Yellow Scarves under Cheng Yuanzhi. Killed by Zhang Fei. Deng Mao is a fictional character. Deng Mao was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Deng Mao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
